conflict: Father and daughter both reach for old scripts when conversation turns toward the future.
consequence: A shared meal and imperfect honesty restore limited trust; Ravi admits he used training to avoid grief rather than process it.
must_land_beats: Domestic scene grounded in cooking Maya's lemon rice recipe.
Conversation drifts to school gossip and neighborhood life before conflict returns.
Ravi names his fear plainly for the first time.
Anika allows closeness without surrendering boundaries.
objective: Spend one ordinary Saturday without tournament framing.
